Specifically, I thought about how to exactly set-up codes for the alarm system. This includes whether both codes should be randomized or if one should be able to choose codes for the system.     For example, I could choose to use my birth date for my "safe" pin and my CPR-number for my silent alarm pin. Concerningly, I would be interested in knowing if there was more risk in easily remembering the pincodes or if it was important that they were randomized.     As an example, I could risk using my CPR-number code even though it was safe, since it still has a personal remembrance for me.     Hope it makes sense somehow!
